file: How To Replace Wasteful Standup Meetings With Async Voice Messages (Complete System)
brief: If you think your company's stand-ups are productive, you're the problem and I'm  going to show you why. You really closed the loop on what everyone has been about without everyone sitting on a meeting  and being mad about it for good reasons. Team of 10 people, all remote and the owner had no visibility on whatever people were doing. If you don't complete this correctly, then I'll come back to you.
sourceTitle: How To Replace Wasteful Standup Meetings With Async Voice Messages (Complete System)

file: How to Facilitate an Effective Daily Scrum, Not a Status Meeting
brief: For most teams, I found a better approach  is to go backlog item by backlog item. Today I'm going to tell you  how to get team members more engaged in their daily scrums,  how to learn more about each other's work,  and how to more easily notice  if a product backlog item  is going off the rails and needs attention. If you run the meeting item by item,  and team members give updates on all 10 items in the sprint,  that's a problem. Fourth, the number of people who talk about any item  indicates the degree to which team members are collaborating.
sourceTitle: How to Facilitate an Effective Daily Scrum, Not a Status Meeting
